appDescription: Search iTunes for any artist, album, or song, then generate a wallpaper with a blurred cinematic background and centered artwork.
emptySearchDescription: Type an artist, album, or song name to find artwork and generate a wallpaper.
emptyNotFoundDescription: No matching song, album, or artist was found. Try another keyword or a shorter query.
showMetadataDescription: Display title and artist under the album cover
previewSelectPrompt: Select a result to generate a {resolution} wallpaper.
searchEmptyQueryError: Enter an artist, album, or song name to search.
searchNetworkError: Could not reach iTunes Search right now. Check your connection and try again.
searchHttpError: iTunes Search failed{statusCode}. Please try again in a moment.
searchInvalidResponseError: Received an invalid response from iTunes Search.
generationSecurityError: This artwork cannot be exported due to remote image restrictions. Try another result.
generationArtworkLoadError: Could not load a usable artwork image. Try another result or search again.
generationCanvasUnavailableError: Canvas is unavailable in this browser.
generationGenericError: Wallpaper generation failed. Please try another artwork.
